home_hero_lead: For more than two decades Strateco has connected strategy work with operational delivery — for financial institutions, pharma & healthcare, telecom, media & technology and travel, transport & logistics organisations.
home_about_text: We are an owner-managed consultancy headquartered in Bad Homburg. Our consultants come from the very houses they advise today — from boards, treasury, controlling, operations and IT. That practitioner background shapes every engagement: no slide galleries, but solutions that hold up in everyday business once we move on.
home_competence_text: From aligning the organisation to strategy, to finance & controlling, transactions advisory, risk advisory, customer experience analytics and marketing operations. Each theme carries substance — and stands as a mandate in its own right.
home_industries_text: Our competencies create most leverage where complexity, regulation and data volume converge. Four sectors form the core of our client base:
home_cta_text: Tell us what you're working on — confidentially, in an introductory call, without sales pressure. We come back to you within 48 hours.
